to locate the information you need, please contact ResDAC.
| SAS Name | Variable Name | 
|---|---|
| BENE_ID | Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID | 
| ACO_ID | Pioneer ACO Identifier | 
| BIRTH_DT | Date of Birth | 
| DEATH_DT | Date of Death | 
| SEX_CD | Sex | 
| MO1_ALIGN | Month 1 Alignment Flag | 
| MO2_ALIGN | Month 2 Alignment Flag | 
| MO3_ALIGN | Month 3 Alignment Flag | 
| MO4_ALIGN | Month 4 Alignment Flag | 
| MO5_ALIGN | Month 5 Alignment Flag | 
| MO6_ALIGN | Month 6 Alignment Flag |
